In addition, RDA includes a margin of safety, to cover variation between individuals, dietary traditions and practices. The RDAs are What is a balanced diet? What are food groups ? What are nutrient requirements and recommended dietary allowances (RDA)? 15 suggested for physiological groups such as infants, pre-schoolers, children, adolescents, pregnant women, lactating mothers, and adult men and women, taking into account their physical activity. In fact, RDAs are suggested averages/day. However, in practice, fluctuations in intake may occur depending on the food availability and demands of the body. But, the average requirements need to be satisfied over a period of time
